---
title: "O projektu"
date: last-modified
categories: ["Ciljevi", "Otvorena znanost", "Suradnja"]
---

## Ciljevi projekta

Cilj nam je sustavno i empirijski istražiti digitalnu prisutnost katoličke tematike u Hrvatskoj. To ćemo postići kroz četiri cilja:

<div class="card-grid">
<div class="info-card">
<div class="info-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-broadcast"></i></div>
<h4>Prikupljanje podataka</h4>
<p>Automatizirano prikupljanje medijskih objava u realnom vremenu, koristeći alate za <em>web scraping</em> i API integracije.</p>
</div>
<div class="info-card">
<div class="info-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-database"></i></div>
<h4>Baza podataka</h4>
<p>Stvaranje strukturirane i javno dostupne baze podataka koja će služiti kao osnova za buduće znanstvene i javne analize.</p>
</div>
<div class="info-card">
<div class="info-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-cpu"></i></div>
<h4>Računalna analiza</h4>
<p>Primjena računalnih tehnika (obrada prirodnog jezika, strojno učenje) za otkrivanje obrazaca, trendova i narativa u prikupljenim podacima.</p>
</div>
<div class="info-card">
<div class="info-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-share"></i></div>
<h4>Dijeljenje rezultata</h4>
<p>Dijeljenje rezultata kroz znanstvene publikacije, konferencije i radionice, uz objavu koda i metodologije na otvorenim repozitorijima.</p>
</div>
</div>

---

## Istraživačka pitanja

Projekt je organiziran oko jednog temeljnog i četiri izvedena istraživačka pitanja koja usmjeravaju prikupljanje i analizu korpusa.

<div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #0f4c5c; border-radius: 10px; padding: 28px 30px; display: flex; gap: 18px; margin: 1.5rem 0 18px;"><div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; padding-top: 3px; flex: none;">Q1</div><p style="margin: 0; font-size: 17px; color: #14181d; line-height: 1.5; font-weight: 500;">Kako se katolička tematika prikazuje i kako se o njoj raspravlja u digitalnom medijskom prostoru?</p></div>

<div class="card-grid">
<div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; display: flex; gap: 18px;"><div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; padding-top: 3px;">Q2</div><p style="margin: 0; font-size: 15px; color: #2c3036; line-height: 1.5;">Kakve su veze između katoličkih tema i drugih društvenih i političkih pitanja?</p></div>
<div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; display: flex; gap: 18px;"><div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; padding-top: 3px;">Q3</div><p style="margin: 0; font-size: 15px; color: #2c3036; line-height: 1.5;">Koji su akteri i institucije najistaknutiji u tim raspravama?</p></div>
<div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; display: flex; gap: 18px;"><div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; padding-top: 3px;">Q4</div><p style="margin: 0; font-size: 15px; color: #2c3036; line-height: 1.5;">Kako se narativi i tonalitet mijenjaju ovisno o aktualnim događajima?</p></div>
<div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; display: flex; gap: 18px;"><div style="font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; padding-top: 3px;">Q5</div><p style="margin: 0; font-size: 15px; color: #2c3036; line-height: 1.5;">Kakva je mrežna dinamika između različitih platformi i medija koji obrađuju ove teme?</p></div>
</div>

---

## Od medijske objave do analize

Podaci se prikupljaju, filtriraju u korpus, objedinjuju u glavni skup podataka, obrađuju i naposljetku čitaju kroz četiri analitičke razine; svaki se korak nadovezuje na prethodni.

<div style="position: relative; padding-left: 56px; margin-top: 1.5rem;">
<div style="position: absolute; left: 19px; top: 22px; bottom: 22px; width: 2px; background: linear-gradient(#0f4c5c, #cfddE1);"></div>
<div style="position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 24px; align-items: start; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; margin-bottom: 18px;"><div style="position: absolute; left: -56px; top: 22px; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: #0f4c5c; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px;">01</div><div><h3 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 21px; margin: 0 0 3px; color: #14181d;">Prikupljanje</h3><p style="margin: 0; color: #4f535a; font-size: 15px; max-width: 62ch;">Medijske objave s portala, društvenih platformi i foruma pristižu kao tablice — svaki redak jedna objava, s tekstom, izvorom, datumom i pokazateljima dosega i angažmana.</p></div><div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11.5px;"><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">xlsx</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">ingest</span></div></div>
<div style="position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 24px; align-items: start; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; margin-bottom: 18px;"><div style="position: absolute; left: -56px; top: 22px; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: #1a5b6b; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px;">02</div><div><h3 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 21px; margin: 0 0 3px; color: #14181d;">Filtriranje</h3><p style="margin: 0; color: #4f535a; font-size: 15px; max-width: 62ch;">Objava ulazi u korpus samo ako sadrži najmanje dva različita podudaranja s popisom katoličkih i religijskih pojmova — ovo pravilo definira opseg korpusa.</p></div><div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11.5px;"><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">regex</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">≥2 matches</span></div></div>
<div style="position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 24px; align-items: start; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; margin-bottom: 18px;"><div style="position: absolute; left: -56px; top: 22px; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: #2c6f7e; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px;">03</div><div><h3 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 21px; margin: 0 0 3px; color: #14181d;">Korpus</h3><p style="margin: 0; color: #4f535a; font-size: 15px; max-width: 62ch;">Objave koje prođu filtar deduplicirane su i objedinjene u glavni skup podataka — oko 710.000 objava, koje čine jedinstveni izvor za sve analize.</p></div><div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11.5px;"><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">dedupe</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">master</span></div></div>
<div style="position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 24px; align-items: start; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px; margin-bottom: 18px;"><div style="position: absolute; left: -56px; top: 22px; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: #3f8694; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px;">04</div><div><h3 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 21px; margin: 0 0 3px; color: #14181d;">Obrada</h3><p style="margin: 0; color: #4f535a; font-size: 15px; max-width: 62ch;">Iz glavnog skupa izračunavaju se agregati po godini i platformi, a tekst se jezično obrađuje (tokenizacija i lematizacija) kako bi bio spreman za analizu.</p></div><div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11.5px;"><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">aggregate</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">udpipe</span></div></div>
<div style="position: relative; display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr auto; gap: 24px; align-items: start; background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px 26px;"><div style="position: absolute; left: -56px; top: 22px; width: 40px; height: 40px; border-radius: 50%; background: #5a949f; color: #fff; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-weight: 600; font-size: 15px;">05</div><div><h3 style="font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 21px; margin: 0 0 3px; color: #14181d;">Analiza</h3><p style="margin: 0; color: #4f535a; font-size: 15px; max-width: 62ch;">Korpus se čita kroz četiri analitičke razine: mapa ekosustava (doseg i angažman), tematske struje (16 kategorija), atmosfera diskursa (tonalitet i emocije) te fokus na događaje.</p></div><div style="display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 11.5px;"><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">ecosystem</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">themes</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">sentiment</span><span style="background: #eaf0f2; color: #2c5663; padding: 4px 9px; border-radius: 4px;">events</span></div></div>
</div>

---

## Doprinos i vrijednost projekta

Projekt donosi vrijednost na dvije razine — razvoj vještina sudionika i praksu otvorene znanosti.

### Razvoj vještina

Sudionici projekta imat će priliku raditi s najnovijim računalnim tehnikama i alatima. Kroz praktičan rad, razvijat će vještine u analizi velikih količina podataka (Big Data), rudarenju teksta (Text Mining) i statističkom modeliranju.

<p>
  <span class="tag tag-primary">Big Data</span>
  <span class="tag tag-primary">Text Mining</span>
  <span class="tag tag-primary">Statističko modeliranje</span>
  <span class="tag tag-primary">R</span>
  <span class="tag tag-primary">Python</span>
  <span class="tag">NLP</span>
  <span class="tag">Strojno učenje</span>
  <span class="tag">Mrežna analiza</span>
</p>

### Otvorena znanost na djelu

Posebna vrijednost projekta leži u njegovoj predanosti principima otvorenosti i transparentnosti. Naš rad temelji se na principima [otvorene znanosti](https://roadworkasia.com/wp-content/uploads/2023/04/Labour_of_Love_An_Open_Access_Manifesto.pdf) i [reproducibilnosti istraživanja](https://www.nature.com/articles/s41562-016-0021).

Svi alati, skripte i metodološki okviri bit će dostupni kao otvoreni kod na **[GitHubu](https://github.com/lusiki/DigiKat)**, omogućujući drugima da provjere, repliciraju i nadograde naš rad.

Kroz ovakav pristup potičemo suradnju, jačamo istraživačke profile mladih znanstvenika i doprinosimo otvorenijoj i reproducibilnoj znanstvenoj praksi.

---

## Voditelj projekta

Projekt vodi [doc. dr. sc. Luka Šikić](https://www.lukasikic.info/) (Hrvatsko katoličko sveučilište, Komunikologija), a okuplja interdisciplinarni tim istraživačica i istraživača iz komunikologije, sociologije, statistike, povijesti i odnosa s javnošću.

<div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center; max-width: 420px; margin: 1.5rem 0;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">LŠ</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;"><a href="https://www.lukasikic.info/" style="color: inherit; text-decoration: none; border-bottom: 1px solid #cfccc2;">doc. dr. sc. Luka Šikić</a></div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Voditelj projekta</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Komunikologija</div></div></div>

<details style="margin-top: 18px;">
<summary style="cursor: pointer; display: inline-flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; font-family: 'IBM Plex Mono', monospace; font-size: 13px; color: #0f4c5c; font-weight: 600; list-style: none;">Prikaži suradnice i suradnike <span style="font-size: 12px; color: #8a8e95;">(9)</span></summary>
<div class="card-grid" style="margin-top: 18px;">
<div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">AS</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">izv. prof. dr. sc. Andreja Sršen</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">FHS · Sociologija</div></div></div>
<div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">IP</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">izv. prof. dr. sc. Irena Palić</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">EFZG · Statistika</div></div></div>
<div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">LC</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">izv. prof. dr. sc. Lana Ciboci Perša</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Komunikologija</div></div></div>
<div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">PP</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">izv. prof. dr. sc. Petra Palić</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Sociologija</div></div></div>
<div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">IU</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">doc. dr. sc. Ivan Uldrijan</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnik</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Komunikologija</div></div></div>
<div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">SL</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">dr. sc. Suzana Lipar Obrovac</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Odnosi s javnošću</div></div></div>
<div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">HK</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">Hana Kilijan</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Komunikologija</div></div></div>
<div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">VN</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">Veronika Novoselec</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Povijest</div></div></div>
<div style="background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e2da; border-radius: 10px; padding: 22px; display: flex; gap: 16px; align-items: center;"><div style="width: 56px; height: 56px; border-radius: 50%; background: #eaf0f2; color: #0f4c5c; display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; font-family: 'Source Serif 4', serif; font-weight: 600; font-size: 18px; flex: none;">MT</div><div><div style="font-weight: 600; font-size: 16px; color: #14181d;">Matea Topić Crnoja</div><div style="font-size: 13px; color: #4f535a; margin-top: 1px;">Suradnica</div><div style="font-size: 12.5px; color: #8a8e95;">HKS · Sociologija</div></div></div>
</div>
</details>

---

## Pridružite se našem istraživanju!

Tražimo motivirane istraživače i studente koji žele biti dio inovativnog projekta koji spaja društvene znanosti, podatkovnu analitiku i principe otvorene znanosti. Sudjelovanjem dobivate:

<div class="card-grid">
<div class="info-card">
<div class="info-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-graph-up-arrow"></i></div>
<h4>Praktično iskustvo</h4>
<p>Rad s velikim podacima koristeći alate poput <strong>R</strong> i <strong>Python</strong>.</p>
</div>
<div class="info-card">
<div class="info-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-diagram-3"></i></div>
<h4>Tehničke vještine</h4>
<p>Obrada prirodnog jezika (NLP), strojno učenje i mrežna analiza.</p>
</div>
<div class="info-card">
<div class="info-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-award"></i></div>
<h4>Znanstveni doprinos</h4>
<p>Rezultati koji su javno dostupni i citirani.</p>
</div>
<div class="info-card">
<div class="info-card-icon"><i class="bi bi-people"></i></div>
<h4>Dio inicijative</h4>
<p>Koja aktivno promiče transparentnost, suradnju i inovacije u znanosti.</p>
</div>
</div>
